spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates font-variant-emoji: text protecting Unicode symbol fallback rows and pairs that with a real loaded Material Symbols icon-font row.

interactive.rationale: Live-edit input feeds four variant columns and both fallback strips; the color control recolors the monochrome comparison and reset restores defaults.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises live-edit plus a real icon-font strip, and the page now delivers that with Material Symbols and Unicode fallback rows.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now detects Material Symbols loading, explains the blocked-font fallback, and keeps the Unicode text-vs-emoji rows useful when the external font is unavailable.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on localhost:3000 in Chrome 148 loaded /v131/css-font-variant-emoji/symbol-font/, verified Material Symbols loaded, typed `☎ ✈ ♥ ☀ ⚠ ✂`, changed the color control to #008000, and clicked reset. The four grid cells computed to `normal`, `text`, `emoji`, and `unicode`; the fallback strips computed to `text` and `emoji`; reset restored the default string and design-token blue. Console had no messages, Material Symbols and shared font requests returned 200, and the feature conformance route reported 5 pass / 0 fail.
